title: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers

summary: NVIDIA commands a 55% net margin and fortress balance sheet, while Planet Labs burns cash despite 26% revenue growth, a tale of profitability versus potential.

title: Dow Jones Futures: Market Sells Off On Oil Prices, Google, Tesla; Intel Jumps Late
